  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "es5",

    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",

    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [

        "name": "next"

  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
